name: Miyairi Valve Mfg. Co., Ltd.
summary: Miyairi Valve Mfg. Co., Ltd. develops and sells valves in Japan. It provides brass products, such as LP gas cylinder valves, screw-end globe valves, filling valves, screw-end ball valves, safety valves, couplings, and valves for bulk system; steel products, including globe valves, Y-shaped valves, ball valves, check valves, strainers, safety valves, filling valves, and emergency shut-off valves; and level indicators, manifold distribution systems, and high pressure hoses. The company offers its valves for various applications, such as LP gas cylinders, LPG supplying lines, LPG filling devices, bulk storage tanks, gas transportation, storage tanks and piping, and LNG tank lorry. Miyairi Valve Mfg. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
